name: DarkSide Ransomware Activity Detected
notes:
This is rule detects DarkSide ransomware activity.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth
SIGMA Title: DarkSide Ransomware Pattern
SIGMA Description: Detects DarkSide Ransomware and helpers


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%=[char][byte](''0x''+%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -work worker0 -path %' OR ( LOWER("Parent Command") LIKE '%dllhost.exe /processid:{3e5fc7f9-9a51-4367-9063-a120244fbec7}%' AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%\appdata\local\temp\%' ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY DarkSide Ransomware Activity Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%=[char][byte](''0x''+%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -work worker0 -path %' OR  ( 	LOWER("Parent Command") LIKE '%dllhost.exe /processid:{3e5fc7f9-9a51-4367-9063-a120244fbec7}%' 	AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%\appdata\local\temp\%' ) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: DarkSide Ransomware Activity Detected
Event description: Detects DarkSide ransomware activity.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
